shadowSentences: I love reading books in my free time.
Cooking is one of my favorite hobbies.
My friends and I often play board games together.
Traveling to new places always excites me.
I enjoy listening to music while I study.
Spending time in nature helps me relax.
I like to try different cuisines when I eat out.
Learning new languages can be challenging yet fun.
Going to the gym regularly keeps me healthy and active.
Finding a good work-life balance is essential for happiness.

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about environmental awareness.
questions: Q1: Can you share a personal experience that made you more aware of environmental issues?
Q2: What do you think are some common challenges people face when trying to be more eco-friendly?
Q3: In your opinion, why is it important for individuals to care about the environment?
Q4: What advice would you give to someone wanting to live a more sustainable lifestyle?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about remote work.
questions: Q1: What has been your experience with working remotely?
Q2: What challenges do you think people face when working from home?
Q3: What are your thoughts on the future of remote work?
Q4: Can you suggest some tips for staying productive while working remotely?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about volunteering.
questions: Q1: Can you describe a time when you volunteered and what you did?
Q2: What do you think are some obstacles that prevent people from volunteering?
Q3: Why do you believe volunteering is beneficial for individuals and communities?
Q4: What recommendations do you have for someone considering volunteering for the first time?
